race.description: Pfd Foods F&M Marquee 18th April Book Now Hcp
race.comment: PUB CRAWL (4) is part of the Healy team having first start this area but comes here in great form in SA. Speedy type drawn low and will take catching. REVOLUTION RISING (2) returned over 1000m here and ran well, finishing runner-up. Fitter and looks a top chance to go one better. CAP TEN (5) is a former Victorian who wasn't far away at Edenhope last time. First try this area and rates highly on best. CHIEF WHITE SOCK (1) was fourth fresh after a long spell but will be far fitter for it. This suits and expected to improve sharply. HELL OF A GENT (3) is also fitter for a solid return and will be winding up late.
